aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing structured data and limited conversational content, despite having a strong local presence.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate information but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as an authoritative source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and energy-efficient solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to improve AI visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications and expertise through structured data and content.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your HVAC Business for 2026
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more qualified leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI search and drive more business.
